requiredCriteria.label: Role identity
requiredCriteria.description: States a credible role identity for this JD without pretending unsupported direct-fit experience.

requiredCriteria.label: Relevant capability
requiredCriteria.description: Surfaces the strongest supported capabilities that overlap with the JD.

requiredCriteria.label: Business value
requiredCriteria.description: Explains the business or stakeholder value of the candidate's supported work.

requiredCriteria.label: Evidence grounding
requiredCriteria.description: Avoids unsupported ownership, metrics, seniority, sales, architecture, or cloud-delivery claims.

requiredCriteria.label: Customer context
requiredCriteria.description: Connects the Summary to customer, stakeholder, adoption, enablement, or operating context when supported.

requiredCriteria.label: Career positioning
requiredCriteria.description: Separates supported transferable fit from unsupported core requirements.

requiredCriteria.label: Clarity
requiredCriteria.description: Uses concise external recruiter language without generic filler or tool stuffing.

positives: Visible target title is "AI Evaluation Operations Specialist".
Power Platform / M365 signals are visible: power automate, troubleshoot, support, workflow, documentation.

Addresses manager pain points: AI products are scaling quickly and need reliable quality gates; Existing product teams likely need more scientific evaluation methods than ad hoc testing; Enterprise customers require quality, safety, reproducibility, and accountability.
Shows success signals: Evaluation pipelines run reliably and reproducibly; Quality reports clearly drive product improvements.
8 work bullets give enough screening substance.
risks: Screening Gate still has 2 blocking issue(s), so this CV is not manager-ready.
This is a stretch application with 1 unsupported JD requirement(s).
4 JD requirement(s) are only weakly supported; avoid making them headline claims.

2 bullet(s) still read like internal project logs or test notes.
rewriteRequired: Fix blocking Screening Gate issues before treating Manager Review as complete.

Rewrite weakly supported requirements as conservative operational support, not expert ownership.
Rewrite flagged bullets into external business language.
